whyUse.title: Kutheni le nto VirtualMD?
whyUse.description: Fumanisa iingenelo zoguqulo lweqonga lethu lezempilo elinikwe amandla nge-AI

dataPrivacy.title: Imfihlo yakho
dataPrivacy.description: Njengomhlobo omthembileyo, iimfihlo zakho zempilo zikhuselekile kuthi

chat.noSpeechMessage: Khange ndibone nanye intetho ekurekhodweni kwakho. Nceda uzame ukuthethela phezulu okanye ukusondela kumbhobho wakho, uze uzame kwakhona.

footer.copyright: MindScript Technologies LLC. Onke Amalungelo Agciniwe..
footer.medicalDisclaimerTooltip: I-MindScript izama ukuhambisa olona lwazi luchanekileyo, oluhlaziyiweyo lwezempilo kusetyenziswa abantu bezempilo be-AI. Nangona kunjalo, aba bantu abazizo iingcali zempilo ezinelayisenisi kwaye zisenokungachanekanga. Kwimeko engxamisekileyo yokwenene yonyango, cofa u-911 okanye uye kwisebe elikufutshane nawe likaxakeka ngoko nangoko. Ngayo nayiphi na eminye imiba yezempilo okanye phambi kokuba uzame naluphi na unyango okanye amayeza, nceda udibane nomboneleli wezempilo onolwazi okanye ingcali.

forms.passwordTooShort: Igama lokugqithisa kufuneka libe noonobumba abasi-8 ubuncinane
forms.dragAndDrop: Tsala kwaye ulahle iifayile apha, okanye ucofe ukukhetha

hero.subtitle: Iingcebiso zempilo kunye nokuba sempilweni komntu 24/7.

aiImaging.title: I-AI kwi-Diagnostic Imaging
aiImaging.description: Uhlalutyo olupheleleyo lwezicelo zobukrelekrele bokwenziwa kwimifanekiso yezempilo kuyo yonke iradiology, i-pathology, kunye ne-ophthalmology.

pathologyAI.title: Uncedo lwe-AI yePathology
pathologyAI.description: Izicelo zokufunda ezinzulu kwi-digital pathology yokufumanisa umhlaza kunye nokuphucula ukuchaneka kokuxilongwa.

dermatologyAI.title: Dermatology AI Solutions
dermatologyAI.description: Ukufunyanwa kwemeko yesikhumba enikwe amandla e-AI kunye nokuxilongwa kusetyenziswa umbono wekhompyuter kunye nokufunda koomatshini.

mentalHealthAI.title: Impilo yengqondo kunye ne-AI
mentalHealthAI.description: Izicelo zobukrelekrele bokwenziwa ekuhlolweni kwempilo yengqondo, ukuxilongwa, kunye nenkxaso yonyango.

accuracyStudies.title: Izifundo zokuchaneka kwe-AI
accuracyStudies.description: Ukuqinisekiswa kweklinikhi kunye neemetrics zokusebenza kweenkqubo zokuxilonga ze-AI kwiisetingi zezempilo zehlabathi zangempela.

imagingAI.description: Ukusetyenziswa kwe-AI kumfanekiso wezempilo kuyo yonke i-radiology, i-pathology, kunye ne-ophthalmology

aiForLaypeople.description: Ukuqonda i-AI yokhathalelo lwempilo ngokwemigaqo elula - akukho mvelaphi yobugcisa efunekayo

team.addMembersInstruction: Yongeza amalungu eqela ngokucofa kwikhadi elisekunene.
team.maxTeamSizeNote: Ubuninzi babacebisi be-AI bongezwa kwiqela lakho. Ungalitshintsha iqela lakho nangaliphi na ixesha, kodwa hayi ngexesha lokubonisana.

options.allAdvisersCarolOnly: Bonke abacebisi bam bezempilo be-AI (iNgcali yezempilo ye-AI uCarol kuphela)

tooltips.noOtherAdvisers: Akukho abanye abacebisi kuluhlu lwakho onokukhetha kubo. Yongeza ngakumbi kwiprofayile yakho.

united_kingdom:_dial_999_or_11: EUnited Kingdom: Cofa u-999 okanye u-112
process_transactions_and_send_: Inkqubo yentengiselwano kunye nokuthumela ulwazi oluhambelanayo, kubandakanywa iziqinisekiso kunye nee-invoyisi (ukuba ziyasebenza).
unlimited_messages_with_ai_doc: Imiyalezo engenamkhawulo kunye neengcali zezempilo ze-AI
real-world_implementation_and_: UkuPhunyezwa kweHlabathi lokwenyani kunye nezicelo zeMobile
your_access_to_or_use_of_or_in: UKUFIKELELA KWAKHO OKANYE UKUSETYENZISWA OKANYE UKUNGAKWAZI UKUFUMANA OKANYE UKUYISEBENZISA LE NKONZO;
your_computer_may_temporarily_: Ikhompyuter yakho inokugcina okwethutyana iikopi zezixhobo ezinjalo kwi-RAM ehambelana nokufikelela kwakho kunye nokujonga ezo mathiriyeli.
please_select_only_one_special: Nceda ukhethe ingcali enye kuphela yothethwano lwabucala.
provide,_operate,_maintain,_an: Ukubonelela, sebenzisa, gcina, kwaye uphucule iNkonzo.
ai-generated_content_may_conta: Umxholo owenziwe yi-AI unokuqulatha iimpazamo okanye izinto ezishiyiweyo ngaphandle kwenkqubo yethu yokuqinisekisa eyomeleleyo
any_content_obtained_from_the_: Nasiphi na isiqulatho ESIFUMANELWE KWINKONZO; OKANYE
you_may_store_files_that_are_a: Unokugcina iifayile ezigcinwe ngokuzenzekela sisikhangeli seWebhu ngeenjongo zokwandiswa kwesibonisi.
unauthorized_access,_use,_or_a: UKUFIKELELA, UKUSETYENZISWA KOKUNGAGUNYAZWAYO, OKANYE UKUTSHINTSHWA OKANYE UMQULATHO WAKHO (KUHLANGANISA ULWAPHULO LWEENKCUKACHA), NANGONA UKUBA I-MINDSCRIPT IPHUMZE IMIQATHANGO YOKHUSELEKO ENGQIQIWEYO KULE MIGAQO KUNYE NOMGAQO-NKQUBO WASEMFIHLO.
reasonable_business_security_p: iindlela zokhuseleko loshishino olufanelekileyo ngaphakathi eUnited States
improve_the_accuracy,_efficacy: Ukuphucula ukuchaneka, ukusebenza kakuhle, kunye nokhuseleko lweemodeli zethu ze-AI kunye neempawu zeqonga kusetyenziswa idatha engaziwa kwaye idityanisiwe.
mindscript_does_not_provide_me: I-MindScript ayiboneleli ngoxilongo lwezonyango okanye unyango
communicate_with_you_about_pro: Nxibelelana nawe malunga neemveliso, iinkonzo, izibonelelo, ukunyuswa, imivuzo, kunye neziganeko ezinikezelwa yi-MindScript kunye nabanye, kwaye unikeze iindaba kunye nolwazi esicinga ukuba luya kuba nomdla kuwe (ngokuxhomekeke kumalungelo akho okuphuma).
other_locations:_contact_your_: Ezinye iindawo: Qhagamshelana neenkonzo zikaxakeka zasekuhlaleni ngokukhawuleza
ron_rubin,_phd_and_sandy_miles: Ron Rubin, PhD kunye noSandy Miles
send_technical_notices,_update: Thumela izaziso zobugcisa, uhlaziyo, izilumkiso zokhuseleko, kunye nenkxaso kunye nemiyalezo yolawulo.
respond_to_your_comments,_ques: Phendula kwizimvo zakho, imibuzo, kunye nezicelo kwaye unikezele ngenkonzo yabathengi.
you_may_print_or_download_one_: Ungaprinta okanye ukhuphele ikopi enye yenani elifanelekileyo lamaphepha eSiza ukuze usebenzise ulwazi lwakho lomntu siqu, olungelulo olorhwebo kwaye hayi ukuvelisa kwakhona, ukupapashwa, okanye ukusasazwa.
note_on_ai_aileencarol's_particip: Qaphela kwi-AI yeNgcali yeMpilo kaCarol yokuthatha inxaxheba:
share_your_account_credentials: Yabelana ngeenkcukacha zeakhawunti yakho okanye uvumele abanye ukuba bafikelele kwi-akhawunti yakho (ngaphandle kokuba kuvunyelwe ngokucacileyo kwii-akhawunti zombutho).
your_unique_medical_history,_c: Imbali yakho yempilo eyodwa, iimeko, kunye neemeko zifuna uphononongo lobuchwephesha
use_another_user's_account_wit: Sebenzisa iakhawunti yomnye umsebenzisi ngaphandle kwemvume.
if_you_can_see_this,_react_is_: Ukuba uyayibona le nto, iReact iyasebenza!
provide_false_or_misleading_in: Nika ulwazi olungeyonyani okanye olulahlekisayo ngexesha lobhaliso okanye kwiprofayile yakho yeakhawunti.
no_ai_health_advisers_selected: Akukho bacebisi bezempilo be-AI abakhethiweyo. Ungalawula abacebisi bakho kwiprofayile yakho.
carry_out_any_other_purpose_de: Yenza nayiphi na enye injongo echazwe kuwe ngexesha lokuqokelela ulwazi.
personalize_and_improve_the_se: Yenza ngokwezifiso kwaye uphucule iNkonzo kwaye unikeze umxholo okanye iimpawu ezihambelana neeprofayili zabasebenzisi okanye umdla.
health_information_may_become_: Ulwazi lwezempilo lusenokuphelelwa lixesha njengoko ulwazi lwezempilo lukhula
detect,_investigate,_and_preve: Khangela, uphande, kwaye uthintele iintengiselwano zobuqhophololo kunye neminye imisebenzi engekho mthethweni kwaye ukhusele amalungelo kunye nepropathi ye-MindScript kunye nabanye.
medical_advice_requires_person: Iingcebiso ngezempilo zifuna uvavanyo lomntu ngamnye ngababoneleli bezempilo abanelayisensi
create_an_account_for_anyone_o: Yenza iakhawunti yakhe nabani na ngaphandle kwakho ngaphandle kwemvume.
cannot_and_will_not_sue_or_hol: AWUKWAZI KWAYE AYIYI KUBANGALA OKANYE UKUBAMBA I-MINDSCRIPT TECHNOLOGIES, LLC, AMAGQEBA AYO, AMAGOSA, ABALAWULI, ABAQESHWA, II-AGENSI, OKANYE ABANTU BAKHONA IPHEPHA-MVUME.
any_conduct_or_content_of_any_: NAKUPHI NA UKUZIPHATHA OKANYE UMQULATHO WALO NAliphi na IQELA LESITHATHU KWINKONZO, KUBANDAKANYA NGAPHANDLE KOMNIKELO, NAKUPHI NA UKUZIPHATHA, UKUKHUSEKA, OKANYE UKUZIPHATHA OKUNGEKHO EMTHETHWENI KWABANYE ABASEBENZISI OKANYE AMAQELA ESITHATHU;
do_not_meet_the_specific_admin: ungahlangabezani neemfuno ezithile zolawulo, zomzimba, kunye nezobuchwephesha ezigunyaziswe nguMgaqo woKhuseleko weHIPAA wokuphatha i-PHI.
your_specialist_team_is_empty_: Iqela lakho lengcali alinanto. Yongeza iingcaphephe ngezantsi.
monitor_and_analyze_trends,_us: Jonga kwaye uhlalutye iintsingiselo, ukusetyenziswa, kunye nemisebenzi ngokunxulumene neNkonzo yethu.

profile.medications: I-Ferrous sulfate 325mg imihla ngemihla, i-Sertraline 50mg imihla ngemihla
profile.healthInfo: Ndiye ndijongene nokukhathala kunye namandla aphantsi kwiinyanga ezidlulileyo ze-6. Ingcali yam yezempilo yandifumanisa ndine-anemia yokusilela kwesinyithi kwaye bendithatha izongezo ze-iron. Ndiyasokola nokudakumba kwaye ndaqala i-antidepressants kwiinyanga ezi-3 ezidlulileyo. Ndikhangela iingcebiso zokulawula zombini iimeko kunye nokuphucula amanqanaba am amandla ewonke.

experience.subtitle: I-smidgeon nje yento iVirtualMD.app enokukwenzela yona.
